error.message: Using the '.*' form of import should be avoided - org.openapitools.codegen.config.CodegenConfiguratorUtils.*.
Import statement for 'io.swagger.v3.core.util.Json' is in the wrong order. Should be in the 'THIRD_PARTY_PACKAGE' group, expecting group 'SPECIAL_IMPORTS' on this line.
Import statement for 'io.swagger.v3.core.util.Yaml' is in the wrong order. Should be in the 'THIRD_PARTY_PACKAGE' group, expecting group 'SPECIAL_IMPORTS' on this line.
